Class OpenApi30DocumentImpl

java.lang.Object
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.NodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.RootNodeImpl
io.apicurio.datamodels.models.openapi.v3x.v30.OpenApi30DocumentImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
Document, Extensible, Node, OpenApiDocument, OpenApiExtensible, OpenApiSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApiServersParent, OpenApi3xDocument, OpenApi3xExtensible, OpenApi3xSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi3xServersParent, OpenApi30Document, OpenApi30Extensible, OpenApi30SecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi30ServersParent, RootNode, SecurityRequirementsParent, ServersParent, Visitable
public class OpenApi30DocumentImpl extends RootNodeImpl implements OpenApi30Document
